scripts.build:remotes: npm run build --prefix apps/location && npm run build --prefix apps/vehicles && npm run build --prefix apps/drivers && npm run build --prefix apps/maintenance
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run preview --prefix apps/location" "npm run preview --prefix apps/vehicles" "npm run preview --prefix apps/drivers" "npm run preview --prefix apps/maintenance" "npm run dev --prefix apps/shell"
